description: A wide designed graphic promoting TSA's 'AskTSA' customer-assistance service, with a cozy autumn/holiday aesthetic. The background is a styled lifestyle photograph on a whitewashed wood surface: a white ceramic mug with a hand-drawn dotted heart, filled with tea, nestled in a chunky knit brown sweater/blanket, surrounded by fall maple leaves (orange/red), cinnamon sticks tied with twine, and star anise. In the lower-left is the 'AskTSA' logo — a stylized briefcase icon with a speech-bubble 'chat' (three dots) — with the wordmark 'Ask TSA.' To the right, black text reads: '8 a.m. - 6 p.m. Sunday - Saturday / Even Holidays.' Visual style: warm, seasonal stock-photo styling with minimal flat branding overlay; soft and inviting rather than enforcement-themed. Messaging technique: friendly/approachable service promotion encouraging travelers to use the AskTSA help channel during holiday travel. Target audience: the traveling public. A designed promotional graphic (not a meme).
notable_text: Ask TSA | 8 a.m. - 6 p.m. Sunday - Saturday Even Holidays
